name: Just Like Everyone Else
overview: The successful and beautiful Anna Koltsova has achieved everything in her life that could only be dreamed of. Success, fame, fans, beloved husband, friends who are always there. Anna is the owner of a glossy magazine and a popular TV talk show host. She is not only a professional in her field, but also a hardworking woman who understands everything she does. She is also loved by her husband, loves herself and does an excellent job with household chores, despite the workload and projects.
